description_long: This object depicts a medium-sized bird with a predominantly orange-brown and white plumage, lying on a flat surface. The bird's body is robust and rounded, with a thick, fluffy coat of feathers that transitions from a rich orange-brown on the back and sides to white on the underbelly and face. The head is broad with a short, conical beak, and the eyes are set forward, giving it a gentle expression. The wings are folded against the body, blending seamlessly with the rest of the plumage, and the tail is short and rounded. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall posture suggests the bird is resting or sitting. The surface texture appears soft and matte, with a natural feathered appearance.
description: A medium-sized, orange-brown and white bird with a fluffy, rounded body and short, conical beak, resting on a flat surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's orange-brown back, white underbelly, and short tail, with some missing or fragmented areas.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bird's back and tail, with the orange-brown plumage most prominent and the head partially obscured.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full length of the bird's back and the transition from orange-brown to white feathers.
description_view_3: Front view showing the bird's face, white cheeks, and conical beak, with the eyes and head clearly visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid orange-brown with white patches on the underbelly, face, and sides
